title: cirsium mollissimum
intro: Cirsium mollissimum, also known as the silky thistle or velvety plumeless thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cirsium mollissimum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
